ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the business */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* Logo URL of the business */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Technology, Fitness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories" (
  "business_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business-category association */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_categories_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, business owner, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the business */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business that is favorited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the favorite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the favorite was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for admin authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., super admin, moderator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Business ID for which analytics data is recorded */,
  "visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the business profile */,
  "ratings_count" INTEGER /* Count of ratings received by the business */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the business */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification (true/false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business that the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_images_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business that the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_videos_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business that offers the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_services_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business hour */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business that the hour belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the business */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the business */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hour was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hour was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_hours_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business that the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_locations_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that the log belongs to */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message for the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
